title: Call for Joint Activity Proposals: Q1 2025
excerpt: FITTER-EU invites sister projects to propose joint activities including workshops, publications, and collaborative events for the first quarter of 2025.
content:
FITTER-EU is now accepting proposals for joint activities with sister projects in our network. We welcome proposals for:

## Types of Activities

- **Workshops**: Thematic sessions on just transition methodologies, policy engagement, or stakeholder involvement
- **Publications**: Co-authored papers, policy briefs, or better practice guides
- **Events**: Joint sessions at conferences or dedicated networking events
- **Knowledge Exchange**: Structured sharing of tools, data, or approaches

## How to Apply

Visit the Collaborate page and complete the Joint Activity Proposal form with your idea, timeline, and expected outcomes.

## Timeline

Proposals for Q1 2025 activities should be submitted by the end of February 2025.

## Questions?

Contact us at info@fitter-eu.com with any questions about eligible activities or the proposal process.

title: Welcome to Our Growing Sister Project Network
excerpt: FITTER-EU welcomes ten new sister projects to our network, expanding opportunities for cross-project collaboration on fair transitions.
content:
We are delighted to welcome ten Horizon Europe projects to the FITTER-EU Sister Project Network. This diverse group brings expertise across just transition, digital inclusion, green skills, and policy development.

## New Network Members

Our network now includes projects such as Readjust, ST4TE, Greenpaths, Twin Synergies, and others who share our commitment to ensuring Europe's twin transition is fair and inclusive for all.

## Collaboration Opportunities

With this expanded network, we see significant opportunities for:

- Cross-project knowledge exchange on methodologies and tools
- Joint stakeholder engagement activities
- Collaborative publications addressing common challenges
- Shared dissemination and outreach

## Join Us

If your Horizon Europe project works on related themes and you'd like to join our network, visit the Collaborate page to apply.

## Learn More

Visit the Sister Projects page to explore the full network and learn about each project's focus and activities.

title: FITTER-EU Launches Sister Project Engagement Platform
excerpt: A new dedicated platform for cross-project collaboration between Horizon Europe projects working on fair twin transitions is now live.
content:
We are pleased to announce the launch of the FITTER-EU initiated Sister Project Engagement platform, designed to facilitate collaboration and knowledge sharing between Horizon Europe projects focused on fair, inclusive green and digital transitions.

## Purpose

The platform serves as a central hub for:

- Connecting projects with complementary expertise
- Proposing and coordinating joint activities
- Sharing resources and best practices
- Building a community of practice around just transitions.

## Get Involved

Projects working on related themes are invited to join our network and explore collaboration opportunities. Visit the Collaborate page to submit your project or propose a joint activity.

## Contact

For more information, contact the FITTER-EU team at contact@tfcengage.com .
